ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  "character_level" INTEGER /* Level or rank of the character */,
  "faction" TEXT /* Faction or group of the character */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the character's avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., quest, interaction, behavior) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required for the activity to start */,
  "props" TEXT /* Props used in the activity */,
  "entry_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_entry_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_type_id") REFERENCES entry_types ("entry_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character associated with the schedule */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity associated with the schedule */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the activity takes place */,
  "prop_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prop type used in the activity */,
  "entry_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry type */,
  "schedule_key_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_entry_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_type_id") REFERENCES entry_types ("entry_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_prop_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("prop_type_id") REFERENCES prop_types ("prop_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_schedule_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_key_id") REFERENCES schedule_keys ("schedule_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overrides" (
  "override_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each override */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character associated with the override */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity associated with the override */,
  "override_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the override occurs */,
  "override_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the override */,
  "override_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the override */,
  "prop_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prop type used in the override */,
  "entry_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry type */,
  "schedule_key_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("override_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overrides_override_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("override_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overrides_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overrides_prop_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("prop_type_id") REFERENCES prop_types ("prop_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overrides_entry_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_type_id") REFERENCES entry_types ("entry_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overrides_schedule_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_key_id") REFERENCES schedule_keys ("schedule_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overrides_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character associated with the priority */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity associated with the priority */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the activity (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_priorities_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_priorities_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the location */,
  "zone" TEXT /* Zone or area of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prop_types" (
  "prop_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prop type */,
  "prop_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the prop type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prop type */,
  "usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prop_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entry_types" (
  "entry_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry type */,
  "entry_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the entry type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entry type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedule_keys" (
  "schedule_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule key */,
  "schedule_key_name" TEXT /* Name of the schedule key */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the schedule key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., game developer, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_history" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character associated with the change */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity associated with the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)
